flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Florida College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.1k → $20.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Florida College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.1k → $20.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Florida College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (50.6% vs 56.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
